dynamics.empty.title: Connect your first warehouse
dynamics.empty.text: Sales-rate dynamics require a connected warehouse and at least 7 days of history.
dynamics.title: Sales-rate dynamics
dynamics.subtitle: Which SKUs sped up, which slowed down — and what to do. Comparison of the last two aggregation periods.
dynamics.multiWh.title: You have several warehouses
dynamics.multiWh.pre: Dynamics is shown for the selected warehouse
dynamics.multiWh.post: . Switch to another warehouse via the selector in the top-right corner.
dynamics.noData.title: History is accumulating
dynamics.noData.text: To see dynamics you need at least two recalculations in the selected aggregation ({hint}). The dashboard will start working after a few days of regular syncs.
dynamics.storeAvgTip: Average adjusted_velocity across all SKUs per aggregation period. Rising = the store is speeding up overall, falling = cooling down.
dynamics.surge.title: What sped up
dynamics.surge.subtitle: Sales rates grew >10% in the last period
dynamics.surge.tip: Candidates for restocking: demand is growing, important not to go out of stock. Top 10 by adjusted_velocity growth.
dynamics.surge.empty: Nothing sped up — demand is stable or falling.
dynamics.slide.title: What slowed down
dynamics.slide.subtitle: Sales rates fell >10% in the last period
dynamics.slide.tip: What happened? Season ended, listing issue, price increase? Top 10 by adjusted_velocity drop.
dynamics.slide.empty: Nothing slowed down — all SKUs are stable.
dynamics.all.title: All changes
dynamics.all.tip: Top 50 SKUs sorted by the absolute magnitude of the rate change. Inactive SKUs are hidden by default.
dynamics.all.count: Sorted by change magnitude · {total} SKUs total, {shown} shown
dynamics.col.name: Name
